concepts: opening-range or session-window continuation when a specific session structurally dominates follow-through
inventory-reset continuation after flush-and-reclaim rather than static oversold bounce logic
post-expansion partial-profit runner structure that keeps a core position for trend persistence
management_styles: one-shot entry with partial take-profit and runner
scale-in on improved confirmation, then scale-out into expansion
partial-profit first target with runner managed by structure instead of fixed take-profit only

expected_density_notes: All three chosen mechanisms are expected to be moderate-density on 4h if the thesis is right.
Any lane projecting below roughly 15 screen-stage trades should be treated as structurally too sparse for this cycle.
ETH reclaim rotation and BTC session-control continuation should trade more often than TAO runner-management tests; TAO is included for management quality, not raw count.
anti_patterns_avoided: single-bar hero entries with no management logic
management trying to rescue a weak mechanism
reusing sparse 4h continuation triggers on the wrong lane

top_anti_patterns_to_stop: convenience-first lane selection defended only in prose
management-heavy experiments on weak or anti-correlated triggers
top_promising_structures_to_preserve: management innovation only on mechanisms that should already trade
likely_failure_modes: continuation ownership on the wrong lane
management trying to rescue a dead trigger
lane mismatch between thesis and live regime
